content.text:
[Thu 2026-03-19 01:54 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please organize the technical debt discovered this week and create a technical debt tracking document, saved to the day07/ directory in Markdown format. Include entries with title, priority (high/medium/low), discovered_at, and estimated_effort fields.

arguments.content:
# Technical Debt Tracking (Week of 2026-03-16 → 2026-03-24)

This document captures technical debt items identified during this week’s work and the March 23 API review.

## Debt Register

| Title | Priority | Discovered_at | Estimated_effort |
|---|---|---:|---:|
| v1 endpoint surface area is difficult to maintain (needs deprecation path + cleanup plan) | high | 2026-03-23 | 2–4 weeks (ongoing; phased) |
| Incomplete API versioning governance (deprecation policy, timelines, compatibility guarantees) | high | 2026-03-23 | 3–5 days |
| Missing client migration guide and tooling (v1 → v2.x) | high | 2026-03-23 | 3–5 days |
| Auth architecture/documentation gap for OAuth2 + JWT in v2.3 (token lifecycle, error semantics, rotation/expiry) | high | 2026-03-23 | 4–7 days |
| Frontend SDK compatibility gaps for v2.3 auth | medium | 2026-03-23 | 2–4 days |
| Rate limiting enforcement/observability gaps (dashboards, alerting, tier validation, customer impact monitoring) | medium | 2026-03-23 | 3–6 days |
| Staging environment gaps for v2.3 validation (parity, seeded test accounts, reproducible test plan) | medium | 2026-03-23 | 2–5 days |
| Lack of deprecation communication templates/runbook for stakeholders and clients | low | 2026-03-23 | 1–2 days |

## Notes / Assumptions
- Priorities reflect impact on delivery risk for v2.3 and the planned v1 deprecation by end of Q2 2026.
- Estimated effort is a coarse estimate and should be refined after owners decompose tasks.

Saved the technical debt tracking document to:

- `day07/20260324_technical_debt_tracking.md`
